description: Comprehensive curl tests for user-service, event-service, and message-service

user_service_tests.name: Update profile - valid request
user_service_tests.curl: curl -X PUT http://localhost:8081/profile -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"first_name":"UpdatedJohn","last_name":"UpdatedDoe","bio":"Updated bio"}'

user_service_tests.name: Update profile - empty JSON
user_service_tests.curl: curl -X PUT http://localhost:8081/profile -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{}'

user_service_tests.name: Update profile - invalid JSON
user_service_tests.curl: curl -X PUT http://localhost:8081/profile -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"first_name:"invalid"}'

user_service_tests.name: Update avatar - valid request
user_service_tests.curl: curl -X PUT http://localhost:8081/profile/avatar -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"avatar_url":"http://example.com/newavatar.png"}'

user_service_tests.name: Update avatar - missing avatar_url
user_service_tests.curl: curl -X PUT http://localhost:8081/profile/avatar -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{}'

user_service_tests.name: Get friend suggestions - no auth token
Send friend request - no auth token
Send friend request - valid request
user_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8081/friends/request -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"receiver_id":2}'

user_service_tests.name: Send friend request - missing receiver_id
user_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8081/friends/request -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{}'

user_service_tests.name: Send friend request - invalid receiver_id (0)
user_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8081/friends/request -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"receiver_id":0}'

user_service_tests.name: Send friend request - self-friend request
user_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8081/friends/request -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"receiver_id":1}'

user_service_tests.name: Accept friend request - no auth token
Accept friend request - invalid request ID
Reject friend request - no auth token
Method not allowed - GET on register
Method not allowed - DELETE on login
Login with special chars in password
Extra fields in request
user_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8081/register -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"email":"extra@example.com","username":"extrauser","password":"password123","first_name":"Extra","last_name":"Fields","age":25,"extra_field":"should be ignored"}'

event_service_tests.name: Create event - valid request
event_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8082/events -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"title":"Test Event","description":"A test event","event_date":"2026-12-31T23:59:59Z","latitude":55.7558,"longitude":37.6173,"address":"Moscow","is_free":true,"category":"Sports"}'

event_service_tests.name: Create event - out of range latitude (>90)
Create event - out of range latitude (<-90)
Create event - out of range longitude (>180)
Create event - out of range longitude (<-180)
Create event - negative price with is_free false
Register for event - invalid event ID
Unregister from event - invalid event ID
Update event - valid request
event_service_tests.curl: curl -X PUT http://localhost:8082/events/1 -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"title":"Updated Title"}'

event_service_tests.name: Update event - invalid event ID
event_service_tests.curl: curl -X PUT http://localhost:8082/events/abc -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"title":"Updated"}'

event_service_tests.name: Update event - empty JSON
event_service_tests.curl: curl -X PUT http://localhost:8082/events/1 -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{}'

event_service_tests.name: Wrong method - POST on get events
Wrong method - PATCH on events list

message_service_tests.name: Send message - no auth
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"group_id":1,"content":"Hello World"}'

message_service_tests.name: Send message - valid request
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":1,"content":"Hello World"}'

message_service_tests.name: Send message - missing group_id
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"content":"Hello World"}'

message_service_tests.name: Send message - missing content
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":1}'

message_service_tests.name: Send message - empty JSON
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{}'

message_service_tests.name: Send message - invalid JSON
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id:"invalid"}'

message_service_tests.name: Send message - invalid group_id (string)
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":"abc","content":"Hello"}'

message_service_tests.name: Send message - zero group_id
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":0,"content":"Hello"}'

message_service_tests.name: Send message - negative group_id
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":-1,"content":"Hello"}'

message_service_tests.name: Send message - empty content
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":1,"content":""}'

message_service_tests.name: Send message - whitespace only content
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":1,"content":"   "}'

message_service_tests.name: Get messages by group - valid request
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X GET http://localhost:8083/messages/group/1

message_service_tests.name: Get messages by group - invalid group ID (string)
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X GET http://localhost:8083/messages/group/abc

message_service_tests.name: Get messages by group - zero group ID
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X GET http://localhost:8083/messages/group/0

message_service_tests.name: Get messages by group - negative group ID
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X GET http://localhost:8083/messages/group/-1

message_service_tests.name: Get messages by group - with limit
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X GET "http://localhost:8083/messages/group/1?limit=10"

message_service_tests.name: Get messages by group - zero limit
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X GET "http://localhost:8083/messages/group/1?limit=0"

message_service_tests.name: Get messages by group - negative limit
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X GET "http://localhost:8083/messages/group/1?limit=-5"

message_service_tests.name: Get messages by group - invalid limit (string)
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X GET "http://localhost:8083/messages/group/1?limit=abc"

message_service_tests.name: Health check
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X GET http://localhost:8083/health

message_service_tests.name: Root endpoint
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X GET http://localhost:8083/

message_service_tests.name: Invalid endpoint
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X GET http://localhost:8083/invalid

message_service_tests.name: Wrong method - GET on send message
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X GET http://localhost:8083/messages

message_service_tests.name: Wrong method - DELETE on get messages
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X DELETE http://localhost:8083/messages/group/1

message_service_tests.name: Non-JSON content type
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: text/plain" -d 'group_id=1&content=Hello'

message_service_tests.name: Empty body
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages

message_service_tests.name: Very long content
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":1,"content":""}'

message_service_tests.name: Unicode content
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":1,"content":"Привет мир! Hello World! 🌍"}'

message_service_tests.name: XSS in content
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":1,"content":"<script>alert(1)</script>"}'

message_service_tests.name: SQL injection in content
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":1,"content":"SELECT * FROM users"}'

message_service_tests.name: Boolean as string in group_id
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":"true","content":"Hello"}'

message_service_tests.name: Null in content
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":1,"content":null}'

message_service_tests.name: Array in content
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":1,"content":["Hello"]}'

message_service_tests.name: Object in content
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":1,"content":{"text":"Hello"}}'

message_service_tests.name: Very large group_id
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":999999999999999999,"content":"Hello"}'

message_service_tests.name: Multiple messages in quick succession
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":1,"content":"Message 1"}' && curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":1,"content":"Message 2"}'

message_service_tests.name: HTML tags in content
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":1,"content":"Bold and Italic"}'

message_service_tests.name: Newlines in content
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":1,"content":"Line 1\nLine 2\nLine 3"}'

message_service_tests.name: Tabs in content
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":1,"content":"Tab\there"}'

message_service_tests.name: Emoji in content
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":1,"content":"Hello 👋😊"}'

message_service_tests.name: URL in content
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":1,"content":"Check https://example.com"}'

message_service_tests.name: Email in content
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":1,"content":"Contact test@example.com"}'

message_service_tests.name: JSON-like content
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":1,"content":"{\"key\":\"value\"}"}'

message_service_tests.name: Float in group_id
message_service_tests.curl: curl -X POST http://localhost:8083/messages -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer VALID_TOKEN" -d '{"group_id":1.5,"content":"Hello"}'
